summary: Completed testing of TemaDom Marketplace Iteration 3 features including homepage calculator section with benefits, navigation improvements, and project card enhancements

critical_bugs.issue: Login not working with provided test credentials client@test.bg / test123
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot test project creation form with ProjectEstimator component

integration_issues.issue: No estimated budget (~X € оценка) visible in project cards, even though code supports it

passed_tests: Homepage calculator section with benefits description fully implemented
Calculator section shows '28 категории услуги' benefits text
Calculator section shows 'Цени по региони' with Sofia, Plovdiv, Varna and 6 more cities
Calculator section shows '3 нива качество' quality levels text
Homepage calculator section displays example calculation showing 8,556€
Navigation has 'Намери проекти' link working properly (data-testid='nav-projects')
Navigation has 'Публикувай проект' button for non-logged users (data-testid='register-btn')
Calculator CTA button present and functional (data-testid='calculator-cta')
Projects page loads correctly showing 5 project cards
Project cards show images when available (confirmed 1 image visible)
Registration page loads with client/company selection tabs
ProjectEstimator component exists in codebase and is imported in App.js
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix login authentication for test credentials client@test.bg / test123 so project creation form with ProjectEstimator can be tested. Also check why estimated budget is not displaying in project cards despite code support.

success_percentage.backend: Unable to test due to login issues
success_percentage.frontend: 80% (6/7 main features working - missing project creation form testing and estimated budget display)
